etapas.tutorial: If the adapter does not fit the actuator, the part must be flipped to the larger shaft.
Use an Allen key to loosen the adapter's center screw.
Remove the part, flip it to the correct bore side (large shaft) and reposition it.
Retighten the center screw, firmly securing the adapter to the valve shaft.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
